source: Maintained structured resource data for README and website rendering. Initial entries were migrated from README; later additions were verified from official project, paper, or challenge pages.

items.name: OpenSlide
items.description: The foundational C library and Python interface for reading many WSI formats.

items.name: QuPath
items.description: Open-source software for WSI visualization, annotation, and bioimage analysis.

items.name: ASAP
items.description: A fast WSI viewer with annotation tools and support for visualizing algorithm outputs.

items.name: SlideIO
items.description: A Python module for reading whole slides and slide regions across multiple microscopy formats.

items.name: large_image
items.description: A tile-source library for serving and processing large images, including WSI-style tiled access.

items.name: paquo
items.description: A Python interface for interacting with QuPath projects and annotations.

items.name: ASlide
items.description: An integrated pathology image reading library with broad format support.

items.name: histolab
items.description: A digital pathology image-processing library for WSI tiling and tissue-aware preprocessing.

items.name: HistoQC
items.description: An open-source quality-control tool for detecting artifacts and quantifying slide quality.

items.name: HistomicsTK
items.description: A Python toolkit for pathology image analysis algorithms in the Digital Slide Archive ecosystem.

items.name: SliDL
items.description: A toolbox for WSI preprocessing workflows in deep learning, including tiling and artifact/background filtering.

items.name: PathML
items.description: A Python toolbox for computational pathology workflows over high-resolution pathology images.

items.name: CLAM
items.description: A WSI pipeline for patching, feature extraction, MIL training, and heatmap visualization.

items.name: Trident
items.description: A foundation-model-oriented WSI processing toolkit from Mahmood Lab.

items.name: TIAToolbox
items.description: An end-to-end PyTorch toolkit for WSI reading, preprocessing, modeling, and visualization.

items.name: Slideflow
items.description: A Python package for building and evaluating deep learning models for digital pathology.

items.name: GDC Data Portal
items.description: Access to cancer study data, including TCGA and CPTAC tissue slide images where available.

items.name: TCGA
items.description: A landmark cancer genomics program with diagnostic slide images accessible through the GDC ecosystem.

items.name: GTEx Histology Viewer
items.description: Histology images from the Genotype-Tissue Expression project across normal human tissues.

items.name: HEST-1k
items.description: Paired histology and spatial transcriptomics data with an accompanying HEST library and benchmark.

items.name: Camelyon16
items.description: H&E lymph-node WSIs for breast cancer metastasis detection.

items.name: Camelyon17
items.description: Multi-center H&E lymph-node WSIs for breast cancer metastasis detection and classification.

items.name: PANDA
items.description: Prostate biopsy WSIs for Gleason grading and prostate cancer grade assessment.

items.name: BRACS
items.description: Breast carcinoma subtyping data with labeled WSIs and labeled ROIs.

items.name: BCNB
items.description: Early breast cancer core-needle biopsy WSIs with clinical variables and pathologist annotations.

items.name: PAIP2021
items.description: Multi-organ WSIs for perineural invasion detection in colon, prostate, and pancreatobiliary cancers.

items.name: TUPAC16
items.description: Breast cancer WSIs for tumor proliferation assessment.

items.name: TIGER
items.description: Breast cancer WSIs for tumor-infiltrating lymphocyte assessment.

items.name: ACROBAT
items.description: Multi-stain breast cancer WSIs for WSI registration.

items.name: HEROHE
items.description: H&E breast cancer WSIs for HER2-status prediction.

items.name: BreastPathQ
items.description: Breast cancer H&E WSI-derived data for tumor cellularity assessment.

items.name: Quilt-1M
items.description: A histopathology image-text dataset with paired image-text samples curated from educational and web sources.

items.name: OpenPath
items.description: Pathology image-text pairs curated from public medical social-media content for PLIP pretraining.

items.name: PathGen-1.6M
items.description: A pathology image-caption dataset generated through a multi-agent collaboration pipeline.

categories.title: Pathology Foundation Model and MIL Benchmarks

items.name: Patho-Bench
items.description: A standardized benchmark library for computational pathology foundation models.

items.name: HEST-Benchmark
items.description: A benchmark for evaluating pathology foundation models on gene-expression prediction from histology.

items.name: PathBench-MIL
items.description: A benchmarking and AutoML framework for multiple-instance learning pipelines in histopathology.

items.name: THUNDER
items.description: A tile-level histopathology benchmark for comparing pathology foundation models across downstream performance, feature space, robustness, and uncertainty.

items.name: eva
items.description: An open-source evaluation framework and public leaderboard for oncology and pathology foundation models.

items.name: PLISM benchmark
items.description: A robustness benchmark for pathology foundation models on the PLISM dataset.

items.name: PathBench (Clinical PFM)
items.description: A multi-task, multi-organ clinical benchmark and leaderboard for real-world pathology foundation model evaluation.

items.name: WSI-Bench
items.description: A morphology-aware benchmark for gigapixel WSI understanding and VQA.

items.name: SlideBench
items.description: A WSI multimodal benchmark released with SlideChat for captioning, report, and closed-form VQA tasks.

items.name: PathMMU
items.description: An expert-validated pathology multimodal understanding and reasoning benchmark.

items.name: PathBench (LMM)
items.description: A patch- and WSI-level pathology large multimodal model benchmark with PatchVQA, WSICap, and WSIVQA subsets.

items.name: HistoVL
items.description: A holistic histopathology vision-language benchmark spanning many organs, cancer types, cohorts, and acquisition tools.

items.name: DALPHIN
items.description: A multicentric pathology AI copilot and VQA benchmark built from histopathology images derived from whole-slide cases.

items.name: REG2 / REG2026
items.description: A WSI pathology report-generation and diagnostic-reasoning challenge using paired slide and reasoning data.

items.name: PFM-DenseBench
items.description: A large-scale dense-prediction benchmark evaluating pathology foundation models across segmentation datasets and adaptation strategies.

items.name: PathoCellBench
items.description: A cell-phenotyping benchmark for pathology foundation models on H&E histopathology images.

items.name: BCSS
items.description: A breast cancer semantic segmentation benchmark with tissue-region annotations from H&E whole-slide images.

items.name: MIDOG
items.description: A mitosis detection and atypical mitosis classification benchmark focused on domain generalization in histopathology.

items.name: OCELOT
items.description: A cell detection benchmark using paired cell-level and tissue-level histopathology annotations to study cell-tissue interaction.

items.name: Camelyon16
items.description: Breast cancer lymph-node metastasis detection challenge.

items.name: Camelyon17
items.description: Multi-center breast cancer lymph-node metastasis challenge.

items.name: PANDA
items.description: Prostate cancer grade-assessment competition.

items.name: PAIP2019
items.description: Liver cancer WSI segmentation and viable tumor burden estimation challenge.

items.name: PAIP2021
items.description: Perineural invasion detection challenge across multiple organ cancers.

items.name: TIGER
items.description: Tumor-infiltrating lymphocyte assessment challenge in breast cancer.

items.name: ACROBAT
items.description: WSI registration challenge for differently stained breast cancer tissue sections.

items.name: HEROHE
items.description: HER2-status prediction challenge from H&E breast cancer WSIs.

items.name: TUPAC16
items.description: Breast tumor proliferation assessment challenge from whole-slide images.

items.name: BreastPathQ
items.description: Breast cancer cellularity estimation challenge using H&E whole-slide image-derived data.

items.name: ACDC@LungHP
items.description: Automatic cancer detection and classification benchmark for whole-slide lung histopathology.

items.name: DigestPath2019
items.description: Digestive-system pathology detection and segmentation challenge.

items.name: ANHIR
items.description: Automatic non-rigid histological image registration benchmark for differently stained tissue sections.
